hero.headline:
Get cited —
not just ranked
hero.description: We run SEO and AEO as one integrated program. Your brand ranks on Google, gets cited by AI engines, and converts the traffic that actually matters.

stats.label: Generated in 30 days from a single SEO-optimised page
Conversion rate increase for a B2B SaaS health-tech brand
B2B brands grown across SaaS, fintech, and AI verticals
AI engines monitored — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Google SGE

problems.title: Search has changed. So have the strategies.
problems.subtitle: Outdated SEO strategies result in empty pipelines.

items.title: You're ranking. Your pipeline isn't moving.
items.description: You're on page #1 for a handful of keywords. Traffic is ticking up, but demo requests aren't. Monthly reports full of impressions and backlink counts with no clear line to revenue.

items.title: Your brand doesn't show up in AI searches.
items.description: When a buyer asks ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google SGE, your competitors come up. You don't. AI engines don't just scrape Google. They pull from a wider knowledge graph, and if you're not in it, you're invisible to a growing share of customers.

items.title: You have tactics. Not a system.
items.description: Blog posts without a topical strategy. Technical fixes done reactively. Nothing connects search activity to pipeline. You're paying for execution with no accountability to outcomes.

approach.title: How we work: The Autopilot model
approach.intro: We don't wait for tickets or send monthly recommendation decks. We own the roadmap, execute the work, and show up every week with measurable progress tied to your business goals.

steps.title: Foundation audit
steps.description: We map technical health, content gaps, entity coverage, and AI engine presence. Every opportunity is scored against business impact, not keyword difficulty or domain authority vanity scores.

steps.title: 90-day roadmap
steps.description: 3–5 measurable goals tied directly to pipeline outcomes. A shared scoreboard you can check anytime. Clear ownership so nothing stalls waiting for someone to make a call.

steps.title: Continuous execution
steps.description: Content, technical improvements, link building, and AEO optimisation ship weekly. One point of contact. Zero task management on your end.

steps.title: Weekly check-in
steps.description: A live walkthrough of what shipped, how metrics moved, and what's next. Every number tied to outcomes your leadership team actually cares about. Not vanity dashboards.

tracks.title: Two disciplines. One integrated system.
tracks.headline: SEO gets you found. AEO gets you chosen.
tracks.description: Most agencies bolt AEO onto an existing SEO retainer as an afterthought. We built the program so both disciplines feed each other from day one.
tracks.bridge: SEO builds the authority that makes you rankable. AEO makes sure AI engines know about it, and recommend you.

seo.label: SEO
seo.title: Search Engine Optimisation
seo.description: The foundation: technical health, content authority, and the signals Google uses to rank.

aeo.label: AEO
aeo.title: AI Engine Optimisation
aeo.description: The frontier: entity clarity, citation signals, and content AI engines actually recommend.
items: LLM visibility monitoring across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, SGE

items.title: Technical foundation
items.description: Site health, Core Web Vitals, crawl optimisation, structured data, internal linking. The infrastructure that makes everything else compound.

items.title: Content systems
items.description: Topical clusters, comparison pages, FAQ compilations, and programmatic SEO. Built for both Google and AI engines — structured so models can parse it, humans can act on it.

items.title: Off-page + distribution
items.description: Guest posts on high-DR publications, G2 and Capterra presence, Reddit and Quora strategy, community engagement. The exact sources AI engines pull from when forming answers about your category.

items.title: E-E-A-T + authority signals
items.description: Author credentials, expert quotes, thought leadership placement. The trust signals Google and AI engines weigh when deciding who to cite — and who to skip.

items.title: LLM visibility monitoring
items.description: We track how your brand appears across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Mode. Citation frequency, mention quality, competitive positioning — reported weekly, not quarterly.

faq.title: Common questions about our SEO/AEO program

items.question: How is this different from traditional SEO?
items.answer: Most SEO agencies optimise for rankings. We optimise for pipeline. That means every content decision, technical fix, and link target is scored against business impact — not keyword difficulty. And we layer AEO from day one so you're not invisible in AI search while you wait for Google to move.

items.question: What AI engines do you optimise for?
items.answer: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google SGE, Gemini, Claude, and Grok. We monitor citation frequency, mention quality, and competitive positioning across all of them — reported weekly.

items.question: Do I need to manage the work?
items.answer: No. One point of contact. We own the roadmap and execution. You review progress weekly, make decisions when they matter, and skip the project management overhead.

items.question: How long before I see results?
items.answer: Technical fixes and AEO improvements move fast — often within the first 30–60 days. Content authority and organic rankings compound over 90–180 days. We set 90-day goals and report against them honestly — no inflated projections.

items.question: Can you work alongside our existing team?
items.answer: Yes. We integrate with your content, product marketing, and web teams where it makes sense. We can run fully autonomous or in close collaboration — depending on what your team needs.

items.question: What does the weekly check-in cover?
items.answer: What shipped that week, how key metrics moved, what's coming next, and any decisions we need from you. Tied to your 90-day goals — not a vanity dashboard.

ctaBreak.title: Want to see where you stand before committing to anything?
ctaBreak.subtitle: Free audit. No commitment, no pitch. Just a clear picture of where you stand in AI search.

cta.title: Find out if your brand shows up where your buyers are looking.
cta.subtitle: We'll check your AI search presence across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE, and show you exactly where the gaps are.
cta.disclaimer: No automated sequences. No pitch before the audit. We do the work first.
